role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script and language (Arabic) without overreaching into regulatory or landscape.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, climate, and building materials (limestone) consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified plant types (conifers, shrubs) and biome (xeric/Mediterranean) correctly.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road signs, vehicle types, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture + vehicles + poles) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Jordan. The agents adhered well to their roles, with the meta and landscape agents providing the strongest differentiating evidence (limestone architecture, yellow minibus). The linguistic agent was weak due to the non-discriminatory nature of Arabic script, but this was effectively compensated for by other agents.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described limestone cladding and arid environment.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified drought-resistant shrubs and conifers.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the yellow minibus and road signs.
